mapper.select: -- Check that previous months from the last REMINDER_COMPLIANCE_START_YM to last month has been confirmed. SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL008 */ COUNT(1) AS row_count FROM( SELECT COM.COR_LEC_ID, NVL(TO_CHAR(CON.COR_LEC_ID), 'A') AS UNREAD FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION COM LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION CON ON CON.COR_LEC_ID = COM.COR_LEC_ID AND CON.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG = '1' LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK BUL ON BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{brokerCode} LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV IND ON IND.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE COM.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' AND COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE >= #{reminderComplianceStartYm} AND COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE < #{currentMonth} AND BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE IS NULL AND IND.COR_USER_ID IS NULL ) CON1 WHERE CON1.UNREAD = 'A'

-- Check if there is unread compliance letters from target month SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL009 */ COUNT(1) AS row_count FROM ( SELECT COM.COR_LEC_ID, NVL(TO_CHAR(CON.COR_LEC_ID), 'A') AS UNREAD FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION COM LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION CON ON CON.COR_LEC_ID = COM.COR_LEC_ID AND CON.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG = '1' LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK BUL ON BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{brokerCode} LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV IND ON IND.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE COM.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' AND COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE = #{yearMonth} AND BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE IS NULL AND IND.COR_USER_ID IS NULL ) CON1 WHERE CON1.UNREAD = 'A'

SELECT ( CSCI1.ITEMS - CSC1.READS ) AS row_count FROM ( SELECT CASE COUNT(1) WHEN 0 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS ITEMS FROM COR_SELF_CHECK_ITEM CSCI WHERE CSCI.COR_INDICATION_FLG = '1' AND CSCI.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{yearMonth} ) CSCI1, ( SELECT COUNT(1) AS READS FROM COR_SELF_CHECK CSC WHERE CSC.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{brokerCode} AND CSC.COR_ENFORCE_DATE = #{yearMonth} ) CSC1
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0505_01-04_1#SQL002 */ COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION SET COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE = #{COMMUNICATIONDATE}, -- 通信年月 COR_TITLE = #{TITLE}, -- タイトル COR_BRIEF = #{BRIEF}, -- 概要 COR_FILE_NAME1 = #{FILENAME1}, -- ファイル１－ファイル名 COR_FILE_NAME2 = #{FILENAME2}, -- ファイル２－ファイル名 COR_FILE_NAME3 = #{FILENAME3}, -- ファイル３－ファイル名 COR_FILE_DESC1 = #{FILEDESC1}, -- ファイル１－(コメント) COR_FILE_DESC2 = #{FILEDESC2}, -- ファイル２－(コメント) COR_FILE_DESC3 = #{FILEDESC3}, -- ファイル３－(コメント) COR_CONTENTS = #{CONTENTS}, -- コンテンツファイル－(コメント) COR_CONTENTS_FILE_NAME = #{CONTENTSFILE}, -- コンテンツファイル－パス COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, -- 更新日 COR_UPDATE_BY = #{USERID} -- 更新者 WHERE COR_LEC_ID = #{LECTUREID}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COR_USER_ATTRBUTE_INFO ( COR_USER_ID, COR_TS, COR_NAME_FLG, COR_ADDRESS_FLG, COR_TELNO_FLG, COR_OFFICE_FLG, COR_BIRTH_FLG, COR_SEX_FLG, COR_EMPLOYMENT_FLG, COR_OCCUPATION_FLG, COR_BUTEN_ACCOUNT_FLG, COR_EMAIL_FLG, COR_DRAWERSACCOUNT_FLG, COR_DOCUMENT, COR_DATA_COUNT, COR_TRANSACTION_DESC, COR_TRANSFER_CODE, COR_DEPOSIT, COR_DONATION, COR_DEPOSITORY, COR_DEPOSITORY_TERM, COR_DIPOSAL_METHOD, COR_DIPOSAL_FLG, COR_DIPOSAL_DATE, COR_DEPOSIT_OUTLINE, COR_DONATION_OUTLINE, COR_DEPOSITORY_OUTLINE, COR_CREATE_DATE, COR_CREATE_BY, COR_UPDATE_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY, COR_ID, BROKER_CODE, INITIAL_GET_INFO_USER_NAME, INITIAL_GET_INFO_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, SYSDATE, #{nameFlag}, #{addressFlag}, #{telnoFlag}, #{officeFlag}, #{birthFlag}, #{sexFlag}, #{employmentFlag}, #{occupationFlag}, #{butenAccountFlag}, #{emailFlag}, #{drawersAccountFlag}, #{document}, #{dataCount}, #{transactionDesc}, #{transferCode}, #{deposit}, #{donation}, #{depository}, #{depositoryTerm}, #{diposalMethod}, #{diposalFlag}, #{diposalDate}, #{depositOutline}, #{donationOutline}, #{depositoryOutline}, SYSDATE, #{createBy}, null, null, SEQ_COR_USER_ATTRBUTE_INFO.NEXTVAL, #{brokerId}, #{initialGetInfoUserName}, #{userId} )
mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL005 */ CON.COR_LEC_ID, CON.COR_USER_ID, CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE, CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG, CON.COR_CREATE_DATE, CON.COR_CREATE_BY, CON.COR_UPDATE_DATE, CON.COR_UPDATE_BY, BUL.COR_BROWSE_FLAG AS COR_BROWSE_FLAG_BUL, IND.COR_BROWSE_FLAG AS COR_BROWSE_FLAG_IND FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION COM LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION CON ON CON.COR_LEC_ID = COM.COR_LEC_ID AND CON.COR_USER_ID = #{COR_USER_ID} LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK BUL ON BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{brokerCode} LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV IND ON IND.COR_USER_ID = #{COR_USER_ID} WHERE COM.COR_LEC_ID = #{COR_LEC_ID}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL003 */ COR_LEC_ID, SUBSTR(COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE,1,4) || '年' || SUBSTR(COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE,5,2) || '月' COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION WHERE COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' AND COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE > #{FROMDATE} AND COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= #{TODATE} ORDER BY COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE DESC

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL002 */ COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE, COM.COR_LEC_ID, COM.COR_HONBAN_FLG, CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG, IND.COR_BROWSE_FLAG FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION COM LEFT JOIN COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION CON ON CON.COR_LEC_ID = COM.COR_LEC_ID AND CON.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} AND CON.COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG = '1' LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_BULK BUL ON BUL.COR_BROKER_CODE = #{brokerCode} LEFT JOIN COR_BROWSE_CONTROL_INDV IND ON IND.COR_USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE COM.COR_HONBAN_FLG = '1' AND COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE >= #{reminderComplianceStartYm} AND COM.COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE <= #{currentMonth} AND NVL(TO_CHAR(CON.COR_LEC_ID), 'A') = 'A' AND (BUL.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL AND IND.COR_BROWSE_FLAG IS NULL) ORDER BY COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0302_01#SQL006 */ INTO COR_COMPLIANCE_CONFIRMATION ( COR_LEC_ID, COR_USER_ID, COR_CONFIRMATION_DATE, COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG, COR_CREATE_DATE, COR_CREATE_BY, COR_UPDATE_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY ) VALUES ( #{COR_LEC_ID}, #{COR_USER_ID}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{COR_CONFIRMATION_FLG}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{COR_CREATE_BY}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{COR_UPDATE_BY} )

INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0505_01-03_1#SQL002 */ INTO COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION ( COR_LEC_ID, -- LEC_ID COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE, -- 通信年月 COR_TITLE, -- タイトル COR_BRIEF, -- 概要 COR_FILE_NAME1, -- ファイル１－ファイル名 COR_FILE_NAME2, -- ファイル２－ファイル名 COR_FILE_NAME3, -- ファイル３－ファイル名 COR_FILE_DESC1, -- ファイル１－(コメント) COR_FILE_DESC2, -- ファイル２－(コメント) COR_FILE_DESC3, -- ファイル３－(コメント) COR_CONTENTS, -- コンテンツファイル－(コメント) COR_HONBAN_FLG, -- 状態 COR_CREATE_DATE, -- 作成日 COR_CREATE_BY, -- 作成者 COR_UPDATE_DATE, -- 更新日 COR_UPDATE_BY, -- 更新者 COR_CONTENTS_FILE_NAME -- コンテンツファイル－パス ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMPLIANCE.NEXTVAL, #{COMMUNICATIONDATE}, #{TITLE}, #{BRIEF}, #{FILENAME1}, #{FILENAME2}, #{FILENAME3}, #{FILEDESC1}, #{FILEDESC2}, #{FILEDESC3}, #{CONTENTS}, #{HONBANFLG}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{USERID}, IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, #{USERID1}, #{CONTENTSFILE} )
mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0505_01-03_1#SQL001 */ COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION
WHERE COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE = #{COMDATE}
